sources.title: JavaScript — MDN Web Docs
sources.snippet: JavaScript is a programming language that allows you to implement complex features on web pages. It is used to create dynamic content, control multimedia, animate images, and more.
sources.extractedText: JavaScript is a programming language that allows you to implement complex features on web pages. It is used to create dynamic content, control multimedia, animate images, and more.

sources.title: JavaScript - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: JavaScript is a high-level, often just-in-time compiled language that conforms to the ECMAScript specification. It has curly-bracket syntax, dynamic typing, and first-class functions.
sources.extractedText: JavaScript is a high-level, often just-in-time compiled language that conforms to the ECMAScript specification. It has curly-bracket syntax, dynamic typing, and first-class functions.
